Project.title: Project
Project.description: Represents a video editing project showcased in the 'My Work' gallery.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Project entity.

title.description: The title of the video project.

description.description: A brief description of the project, including its scope and challenges.

videoUrl.description: The URL for embedding the video (e.g., YouTube or Vimeo).

thumbnailUrl.description: The URL of the thumbnail image for the video project.

creationDate.description: The date when the project was completed or added to the portfolio.

displayOrder.description: A numeric value to define the display order of projects in the gallery.

Service.title: Service
Service.description: Details about a specific video editing service offered by JeevanEditz.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Service entity.

title.description: The name of the service (e.g., 'Color Grading', 'Documentary Editing').

shortDescription.description: A concise summary of the service.

longDescription.description: Detailed explanation of the service, including what's covered in packages and pricing considerations.

priceInfo.description: Textual information about pricing, such as 'Starting at $XXX' or 'Custom Quote'.

iconUrl.description: URL to an icon representing this service.

displayOrder.description: A numeric value to define the display order of services on the services page.

AboutPageContent.title: AboutPageContent
AboutPageContent.description: Stores the editable content for the 'About JeevanEditz' page.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AboutPageContent entity. (Expected to be a single record).

content.description: The rich text content for the 'About' page, including background, experience, artistic vision, and unique selling propositions.

lastUpdated.description: The date and time when the 'About' page content was last updated.

BlogPost.title: BlogPost
BlogPost.description: Represents an article published on the blog, related to video editing or industry insights.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BlogPost entity.

title.description: The title of the blog post.

slug.description: A URL-friendly version of the blog post title.

content.description: The full rich text content of the blog article.

publishDate.description: The date and time when the blog post was published.

isPublished.description: Indicates whether the blog post is publicly visible.

featuredImageUrl.description: The URL of an optional featured image for the blog post.

categoryId.description: Reference to the Category this blog post belongs to.

tagIds.description: References to Tags associated with this blog post.

Category.title: Category
Category.description: A category for organizing blog posts.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Category entity.

name.description: The name of the category (e.g., 'Color Grading Tips', 'Industry News').

slug.description: A URL-friendly version of the category name.

SiteSettings.title: SiteSettings
SiteSettings.description: Global settings for the JeevanEditz portfolio.

ContactSubmission.title: ContactSubmission
ContactSubmission.description: Represents a message submitted through the 'Contact' form.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ContactSubmission entity.

name.description: The name of the person submitting the form.

email.description: The email address of the sender for follow-up.

subject.description: The subject line of the inquiry, if provided by the form.

message.description: The full message content from the submission.

submissionDate.description: The date and time when the contact form was submitted.

status.description: The current status of the inquiry (e.g., 'New', 'Read', 'Replied', 'Archived').
